examples.dg: Wazabwa photsi kpwa uchovu bada ya kazi ngumu.
examples.en: He flopped down exhausted after hard work.
examples.sw: Aliketi kabisa kwa uchovu baada ya kazi ngumu.

senses.definition_en: to bend over, to sink, to bow down
senses.definition_dg: Kuinama photsi, au kuzama kpwenye madzi.

examples.en: The doctor bent over to look at the patient
examples.sw: Daktari aliinama kumtazama kidonda.

examples.en: The stone has sunk
examples.sw: Daktari aliinama kumtazama kidonda.

examples.en: She is bending the branch

examples.dg: Zamani atu kala anaishi kpwa ujanja wa tsakani.
examples.en: Long ago people lived by the wit of the bush.
examples.sw: Zamani watu waliishi kwa ujuzi wa porini.

senses.definition_dg: Rangi ya zambarau, kahi-kahi ya mwekundu na buluu.

examples.dg: Mchetu wavwala nguwo ya rangi ya zambalau.
examples.en: The woman wore a purple colored garment.
examples.sw: Mwanamke alivaa nguo ya rangi ya zambarau.

senses.definition_dg: Rangi ya zambarau, kahi-kahi ya mwekundu na buluu.

examples.dg: Maua haya gana rangi ya zambarau.
examples.en: These flowers are purple in color.
examples.sw: Maua haya yana rangi ya zambarau.

examples.en: He intended to do well in the work.
examples.sw: Alidhamiria kufanya vizuri kwenye kazi.

examples.en: The women performed the zandale dance at the celebration.
examples.sw: Wanawake walicheza zandale kwenye sherehe.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzunguka mutu au phatu (kuhusu atu tu).

examples.en: People surrounded the chief so he wouldn't leave.
examples.sw: Watu walimzingira chifu ili asiondoke.

examples.en: Misfortune struck him when he lost his job.
examples.sw: Bahati mbaya ilimpata alipopoteza kazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kudhani, kuona kukala labda ni hivyo.

examples.en: I suspect he will come tomorrow.
examples.sw: Ninadhani kwamba atakuja kesho.

senses.definition_en: to scorn, to treat with contempt, to ignore someone

examples.dg: Usimzarau mutu kpwa sababu ya umaskini.
examples.en: Don't scorn a person because of poverty.
examples.sw: Usimdharau mtu kwa sababu ya umaskini.

senses.definition_en: a gift, a present, a reward
senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinahoihwa mutu kpwa furaha au kpwa sababu ya kuhenda vinono.

examples.en: The child was given a gift for succeeding.
examples.sw: Mtoto alipewa zawadi kwa kufaulu.

senses.definition_dg: Fuvu ra chitswa, mfupha wa kuezeka ubongo.

examples.dg: Zekeya ra chitswa ni mfupha muhimu.
examples.en: The skull is an important bone.
examples.sw: Fuvu la kichwa ni mfupa muhimu.

senses.definition_en: traditional dance involving singing, clapping and stamping of feet
senses.definition_dg: Machezo ga chijadi ambago ganahumira kuimba, kupiga makofi na kugonga magulu.

examples.en: People performed the zembe dance all night.
examples.sw: Watu walicheza zembe usiku kucha.

sub_entries.definition_sw: it is not appropriate for children to attend this dance as it involves mock insults between groups of men
ngoma inayoimbwa baada ya matanga; si ngoma nzuri kwa watoto kwa sababu ina matusi

examples.dg: Mwivi wakazembuka bada ya miaka miiri.
examples.en: The thief appeared after two years.
examples.sw: Mwizi alitokea baada ya miaka miwili.

senses.definition_en: to cause to appear, hence: to bring forth, to retrieve, to discover, to invent
senses.definition_sw: kufanya kitu kitokee, kwa hiyo: kupeleka, kupata tena, kugundua, kuvumbua, kubuni
senses.definition_dg: Kuhendesa chitu chionekane, kulavya, kugundua au kuvumbua.

examples.dg: Wazembula njira nyiphya ya kuhenda kazi.
examples.en: He discovered a new way of doing work.
examples.sw: Aligundua njia mpya ya kufanya kazi.

examples.en: Don't wander about aimlessly, go home and do work.
examples.sw: Usizunguke bure, nenda nyumbani ukafanye kazi.

examples.en: People taunted him when he lost.
examples.sw: Watu walimzomea aliposhindwa.

equivalents_en: free someone from an evil spell by performing a ceremony in which Qur'anic verses are read and the person may be showered with

senses.definition_en: to free someone from an evil spell by performing a ceremony in which Qur'anic verses are read and the person may be showered with
senses.definition_dg: Kumutuluza mutu kula kpwenye uchawi kpwa kusoma aya za Qurani na kumwosha.

examples.dg: Mganga wamuzenguwa mgonjwa kpwa aya za Qurani.
examples.en: The healer freed the patient from an evil spell using Quranic verses.
examples.sw: Mganga alimponya mgonjwa kwa aya za Qurani.

sub_entries.definition_sw: also used of the same actions being performed in a service of thanksgiving for healing or escape from danger; kuzingua

examples.dg: Asikari ahala zewe kula kpwa adui.
examples.en: Soldiers took loot from the enemy.
examples.sw: Askari walichukua nyara kutoka kwa adui.

equivalents_en: this is the voiced counterpart of sh and occurs in a very few words

senses.definition_en: this is the voiced counterpart of sh and occurs in a very few words, probably of Giryama origin (e.g. chitindizho ‘cattle pen’). As well as sounds that are different, some of the letter combinations used in Digo are
senses.definition_dg: Harufu ya Chidigo ambayo ni sauti ya sh ela kpwa sauti kulu. Inaonekana kpwenye maneno machache, labda ya asili ya Chigiryama.

examples.dg: 'Chitindizho' rina harufu zh ambayo si ya kawaida kpwenye Chidigo.
examples.en: 'Chitindizho' has the zh sound which is uncommon in Digo.
examples.sw: 'Chitindizho' lina sauti zh ambayo si ya kawaida katika Kidigo.

examples.dg: Ziba tundu ra ukuta ili panya asiinjire.
examples.en: Block the hole in the wall so mice don't enter.
examples.sw: Ziba tundu la ukuta ili panya wasiingie.

senses.definition_en: to increase, to keep on (doing something)

examples.en: Keep on doing work well.
examples.sw: Zidi kufanya kazi vizuri.

senses.definition_en: to multiply, to add more, to increase
senses.definition_dg: Kuongeza chitu, kuhendesa chitu chikale chinji zaidi.

examples.en: Increase your efforts so you succeed.
examples.sw: Zidisha juhudi zako ili ufaulu.

senses.definition_en: to slander, to gossip, to tell a lie in order to get something
senses.definition_dg: Kugomba maneno mabii kuhusu mutu ili atu amzire, kusingizia.

examples.en: Don't slander a person, it is wrong.
examples.sw: Usimsingizie mtu, ni kosa.

examples.dg: Chitabu chiziho chi dzulu ya meza ndziho
examples.en: A
examples.sw: Kitabu kizito kiko juu ya meza nzito.

senses.definition_en: zuguza thick, heavy book is on the heavy table

examples.dg: Hinyo atu ariphomsikira, azidi kunyamala zii.
examples.en: When those people heard him, they remained completely silent.
examples.sw: Watu hao walipomsikia, walizidi kunyamala kimya.

examples.dg: Hinyo atu ariphomsikira anagomba chikpwao, azidi kunyamala zii
examples.en: When those people heard him talking thier own language, they became completely silent
examples.sw: Watu hao walipomsikia, walizidi kunyamala kimya.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kutokuwa na upepo, shwari.

examples.en: It (the weather) is calm
examples.sw: Kuna shwari, hakuna upepo wowote.

examples.en: Very cold water
examples.sw: Maji ni baridi sana, hatuwezi kuogea nayo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika mwiri wa mutu ariyefwa kpwenye tsongo, kuzika.

examples.en: The burial was held in the evening.
examples.sw: Mazishi yalifanywa jioni.

examples.dg: Ana ziki kulu kpwa sababu ya ukosefu wa kazi.
examples.en: He is in great trouble because of lack of work.
examples.sw: Ana dhiki kubwa kwa sababu ya ukosefu wa kazi.

examples.dg: Zikiri ni neno ranjine ra dhikiri.
examples.en: Zikiri is another word for dhikiri.
examples.sw: Zikiri ni neno jingine la dhikiri.

senses.definition_dg: Yosi, yenye kukala hai, yenye afya ndzuri.

examples.dg: Mwanache a zima, ana afya ndzuri.
examples.en: The child is healthy, he is in good health.
examples.sw: Mtoto ni mzima, ana afya nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kupoteza fahamu kpwa muda mfupi, kuzimia.

examples.dg: Wazimiya kpwa sababu ya joto kulu.
examples.en: He fainted because of the great heat.
examples.sw: Alizimia kwa sababu ya joto kali.

senses.definition_en: to extinguish, to put out, to switch off

examples.en: Switch off the light before sleeping.
examples.sw: Zima taa kabla ya kulala.

senses.definition_dg: Kusagala na mutu asiye mchumba wako, kuzini.

examples.dg: Kuzinga ni kosa kpwa shariya na mila.
examples.en: Committing adultery is a crime by law and custom.
examples.sw: Kuzini ni kosa kisheria na kimila.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzini, kusagala na mutu asiye mchumba wako.

examples.dg: Kuzini ni dzambo bii kpwa mila na dini.
examples.en: Fornication is a bad thing in culture and religion.
examples.sw: Kuzini ni jambo baya katika mila na dini.

examples.en: Last night the moon was obscured by mist

senses.definition_en: to hate, to resent, to dislike

examples.dg: Usimzire mutu kpwa sababu ya makosa gakege.
examples.en: Don't hate a person because of their mistakes.
examples.sw: Usimchukie mtu kwa sababu ya makosa yake.

equivalents_en: disappear from sight by being covered up

senses.definition_en: to disappear from sight by being covered up

examples.en: The snake disappeared into the grass.
examples.sw: Nyoka ilitoweka kwenye nyasi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuachisha mwanache kushuma, kumwika mwanache chakurya badala ya maziwa.

examples.dg: Mayo wamziza mwanawe ariphofika miezi kumi na miiri.
examples.en: Mother weaned her child when he reached twelve months.
examples.sw: Mama alimwachisha kunyonya mtoto wake alipofikisha miezi kumi na miwili.

senses.definition_en: to prevent, not to allow someone do something

examples.en: Father prevented his child from going there.
examples.sw: Baba alimkataza mtoto wake asiende huko.

examples.en: The cloth is wet
examples.sw: Nguo inazizima, bado haijakauka.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhendesa chitu chipoe au chikale na baridi.

examples.en: Cool down the stew before pouring it.
examples.sw: Poza mchuzi kabla ya kuumimina.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi ra darasa ra 10 rinalolingana na cho.

examples.en: Those clothes are very beautiful.
examples.sw: Nguo zile ni nzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama wa baharina mwenye ganda gumu ambaye anarwa na binadamu, kaa.

examples.en: The fishermen caught crabs from the sea.
examples.sw: Wavuvi walivua kaa baharini.

examples.en: Chase the cattle from the farm!
examples.sw: Fukuza ng'ombe kutoka shambani!

equivalents_en: shuffle on one's bottom or backside

senses.definition_en: to shuffle on one's bottom or backside

examples.dg: Mwanache mdide anazondoha badala ya kutembea.
examples.en: The baby shuffles on his bottom instead of walking.
examples.sw: Mtoto mdogo anatambaa kwa matako badala ya kutembea.

examples.en: That person is said to be involved in witchcraft.
examples.sw: Mtu yule inasemekana anafanya uchawi.

examples.dg: Mwivi wazorerwa ni atu hadi akagbwirwa.
examples.en: The thief was chased by people until he was caught.
examples.sw: Mwizi alifukuzwa na watu hadi akashikwa.

senses.definition_en: to chase away, to chase after

examples.en: Chase away the chickens from the farm!
examples.sw: Fukuza kuku kutoka shambani!

senses.definition_en: to be unsteady, to sway, to stagger

examples.dg: Meza inazuga-zuga kpwa sababu mgulu mmwenga umevundzika.
examples.en: The table is unsteady because one leg is broken.
examples.sw: Meza inatikisika kwa sababu mguu mmoja umevunjika.

examples.en: Don't shake the table, things will fall.
examples.sw: Usitingishe meza, vitu vitaanguka.

equivalents_en: won't fall will be shaken down (e.g. fruits from a tree)

senses.definition_en: won't fall will be shaken down (e.g. fruits from a tree)
senses.definition_dg: Kutingishwa na kugbwa photsi, dza matunda kula muhini.

examples.en: The mango fruits fall when shaken down.
examples.sw: Matunda ya muembe yanaanguka yakitingishwa.

senses.definition_en: to stand up, to appear suddenly

examples.en: He stood up suddenly.
examples.sw: Aliinuka na kusimama haraka sana.

equivalents_en: dig up a hidden charm (see zuza)

senses.definition_en: to dig up a hidden charm (see zuza)
senses.definition_dg: Kungʼoa hirizi au dawa za uchawi ambazo zikazikpwa kpwenye tsongo.

examples.dg: Mganga wazula dawa za uchawi kula tsongoni.
examples.en: The healer dug up the witchcraft charm from the ground.
examples.sw: Mganga alingʼoa dawa za uchawi kutoka ardhini.

examples.en: Don't oppress an innocent person.
examples.sw: Usimdhulumu mtu asiye na makosa.

senses.definition_dg: Zamu, wakati wa mutu kuhenda chitu.

examples.dg: Rero ni zuma rangu ra kujita
examples.en: Today it is my turn to cook
examples.sw: Leo ni zamu yangu ya kupika.

examples.dg: Kala anaimba mazuma kuphokezana na yuya ariyekala dibwani
examples.en: He was singing in turns, taking turns with with whoever was in the pit
examples.sw: Leo ni zamu yangu ya kupika.

equivalents_en: loud singing in a big group walking or dancing

senses.definition_en: loud singing in a big group walking or dancing
senses.definition_dg: Kuimba kpwa sauti kulu kpwa kundi ra atu arikoenenda au kuteza.

examples.en: People sang loudly as they were walking.
examples.sw: Watu waliimba kwa sauti kubwa walipokuwa wanatembea.

senses.definition_dg: Kuimba kpwa phamwenga, kpwa sauti mwenga.

examples.en: People sang in unison at the celebration.
examples.sw: Watu waliimba kwa pamoja kwenye sherehe.

senses.definition_en: to go about everywhere, to wander
senses.definition_sw: to go round, to surround; kuzunguka

examples.en: He went around the whole village looking for work.
examples.sw: Alizunguka kijiji chote akitafuta kazi.

senses.definition_en: to turn something around, to rotate

examples.en: Turn the wheel so the car moves.
examples.sw: Zungusha gurudumu ili gari liende.

examples.en: He showed the visitor around the whole village.
examples.sw: Alimzungusha mgeni kijiji chote.

examples.en: a

sub_entries.definition_en: land by erecting a boundary around it

examples.en: This house is very beautiful.
examples.sw: Nyumba hii ni nzuri sana.

examples.dg: Ni dambi kpwa Mlungu kuzurura bila ya kazi na dziloni unataka kurya
examples.en: It is a sin against God to wander around without work and then expect to eat in the evening
examples.sw: Ni dhambi kuzurura bila kazi na jioni unataka kula.

examples.dg: Atu ateza zuwiya kpwenye sherehe ya chijadi.
examples.en: People performed the zuwiya dance at the traditional ceremony.
examples.sw: Watu walicheza zuwiya kwenye sherehe ya kimila.

examples.en: Prevent the child from going into danger.
examples.sw: Zuia mtoto asiende kwenye hatari.

senses.definition_en: to remove something evil, usually due to witchcraft (utsai) using a
senses.definition_dg: Kuusa chitu kibaya, haswa cha uchawi, kpwa kuisafisha phatu.

examples.dg: Mganga wazuza nyumba yosi kpwa kuisafisha.
examples.en: The healer cleansed the whole house by removing evil charms.
examples.sw: Mganga alisafisha nyumba yote kwa kuondoa uchawi.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kuondoa kitu kibaya kilicholetwa na uchawi (utsai)

examples.en: Don't be foolish, use your brain.
examples.sw: Usiwe mzuzu, tumia akili yako.
